meta.title: GCB Lite — Try in your browser
meta.description: A live WordPress install in your browser with the gcb-lite plugin, the GCB Saas demo theme, and a fully composed home page. Edit any block to see the typed-field Inspector on the right.
meta.author: wordpress-gcb

options.blogdescription: Typed Gutenberg blocks rendered as React. File-based schemas. No UI authoring.

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
flush_rewrite_rules(true);

function gcb_pg_upsert($post_type, $marker, $data, $meta = []) {
    $existing = get_posts([
        'post_type'   => $post_type,
        'meta_key'    => '_gcblite_seed_marker',
        'meta_value'  => $marker,
        'post_status' => 'any',
        'numberposts' => 1,
    ]);
    if ($existing) {
        wp_update_post(array_merge(['ID' => $existing[0]->ID], $data));
        $id = $existing[0]->ID;
    } else {
        $id = wp_insert_post(array_merge($data, ['post_type' => $post_type, 'post_status' => 'publish']));
        update_post_meta($id, '_gcblite_seed_marker', $marker);
    }
    foreach ($meta as $k => $v) update_post_meta($id, $k, $v);
    return $id;
}

$base = get_stylesheet_directory_uri() . '/assets/images';

foreach ([
    ['Postwave CMS Marketing',    'SaaS site',  'project-1.png', 'https://postwave.example'],
    ['Beacon Analytics Dashboard','Web app',    'project-4.png', 'https://beacon.example'],
    ['Glide Editorial',           'Publishing', 'project-2.png', 'https://glide.example'],
] as $p) {
    list($t, $cat, $img, $u) = $p;
    gcb_pg_upsert('project', 'project:' . sanitize_title($t),
        ['post_title' => $t, 'post_excerpt' => 'Shipped end-to-end on GCB.'],
        [
            'cover'    => ['url' => $base . '/project/' . $img, 'alt' => $t, 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500],
            'live_url' => ['url' => $u, 'text' => 'Visit site', 'opensInNewTab' => true],
        ]
    );
}

foreach ([
    ['Maya Hernandez', 'Senior Frontend Engineer', 'Postwave', 'Editor preview and the live site are the same React component.'],
    ['Jordan Ito',     'Editor-in-Chief',          'Glide',    'My editors author in Gutenberg, our frontend is Next.js.'],
    ['Sam Okafor',     'Tech Lead',                'Beacon',   'The typed field system is what hooked me.'],
] as $t) {
    list($name, $role, $from, $q) = $t;
    gcb_pg_upsert('testimonial', 'testimonial:' . sanitize_title($name),
        ['post_title' => $name],
        [
            'quote'        => '“' . $q . '”',
            'author_name'  => $name,
            'author_role'  => $role,
            'author_image' => ['url' => 'https://i.pravatar.cc/120?u=' . sanitize_title($name), 'alt' => $name],
            'from_label'   => $from,
        ]
    );
}

foreach (['Postwave', 'Beacon', 'Glide', 'Northwind', 'Helio', 'Atlas'] as $b) {
    gcb_pg_upsert('brand', 'brand:' . sanitize_title($b),
        ['post_title' => $b],
        ['logo' => ['url' => 'https://dummyimage.com/200x60/202020/ffffff&text=' . urlencode($b), 'alt' => $b, 'width' => 200, 'height' => 60]]
    );
}

$home_content = "<!-- wp:gcb/saas-banner /-->\n\n<!-- wp:gcb/saas-projects /-->\n\n<!-- wp:gcb/saas-testimonials /-->\n\n<!-- wp:gcb/saas-brands {\"source\":\"latest\",\"count\":6} /-->\n\n<!-- wp:gcb/saas-cta /-->";

kses_remove_filters();
$home_id = gcb_pg_upsert('page', 'home-page', [
    'post_title'   => 'Home',
    'post_name'    => 'home',
    'post_content' => $home_content,
]);
kses_init_filters();

// Pin the home page to '/'. Without this WP serves the blog index for /
// and falls through to index.php (the theme's old placeholder text).
update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
update_option('page_on_front', $home_id);
